description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the rust:1.31 Docker image with two stages: build and test. In the build stage add a build-examples job that runs cargo build --examples, and a build-lib job that runs cargo build --lib --features strict. In the test stage add a test job that runs cargo test followed by cargo test --no-default-features --lib --tests. No caches, artifacts, services, variables, or rules are defined.
